title: Like Pattern, Like People.
content:
This is the height of justice: that to do
    Thyself which thou put'st other men unto.
    As great men lead, the meaner follow on,
    Or to the good, or evil action.
meaning:
"Like Pattern, Like People." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
